title: astragalus pullus
intro: Astragalus pullus, also known as Astragalus membranaceus or Huang Qi, is a traditional Chinese medicinal plant belonging to the legume family. It has been used for centuries to boost the immune system and has been found to possess anti-inflammatory, anti-oxidative, and anti-viral properties. The medicinal properties of Astragalus pullus have been attributed to its ability to enhance the body's natural defenses, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce stress levels. Astragalus pullus can be prepared into various herbal forms, including capsules, teas, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its numerous health benefits.
